detector: BYTE-FOR-BYTE j_daily_pattern_ratify.detect_j_vwap_continuation (full pattern, breakout+pullback, no VIX gate = headline cell); live port = backtest/lib/watchers/vwap_continuation_watcher.py
fills_authority: real OPRA bars via lib.simulator_real.simulate_trade_real (C1); nearest-cached strike snap <=4 (infinite_ammo path); causal next-bar-open entry, chart-stop = session extreme via rejection_level
strike_offset_convention: VERIFIED simulator_real.py L357-364: puts strike=atm-offset, calls strike=atm+offset => NEGATIVE offset = ITM for BOTH sides, POSITIVE = OTM (anti-pattern 2.2 cleared)

DISCLOSURE.per_trade: expectancy (exp_dollar / oos_exp) reported, not WR alone (OP-14)
DISCLOSURE.is_oos: IS=2025 vs OOS=2026 split per cell (OP-20)
DISCLOSURE.concentration: top5_day_pct = top-5 winning DAYS as % of total P&L (OP-20 #5)
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: real OPRA fills; SPY-direction != option edge (C3/L58)
DISCLOSURE.no_survivor_pick: every cell reported with clears_bar + the exact failing gates; a positive-but-tiny-N / high-conc / OOS-neg cell is marked clears_bar=false (anti-pattern 2.10)
DISCLOSURE.fill_caveat: nearest-cached strike snap (<=4) means deep ITM/OTM offsets may snap inward when uncached; coverage.fill_rate + strike_off per trade disclose this
